archetype: Archetype 7: Electric & Neon (Adapted for SaaS Utility)

core_principles: Dark mode first: Ensure pure dark aesthetic matching the Skokka extension.
Neon highlights: Use the requested purple/pink gradient as an electric structural highlight, not just a decorative layer.
Utility meets tech: High contrast data visualization with pure white text and muted gray/purple subtext.

spacing_and_layout.sidebar: w-64 bg-[#0f0f11] border-r border-white/5 h-screen fixed top-0 left-0 flex flex-col

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#7c3aed] to-[#ec4899] text-white font-medium rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#ec4899]/50 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(124,58,237,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-[#1a1a2e] text-white border border-[#7c3aed]/30 hover:bg-[#22223b] rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 transition-colors
buttons.danger: bg-red-500/10 text-red-500 border border-red-500/20 hover:bg-red-500/20 rounded-lg px-4 py-2

cards.metric: bg-[#1a1a2e] border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-6 relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-[#7c3aed]/30 transition-colors shadow-lg
cards.glass: bg-[#1a1a2e]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-[#7c3aed]/20 rounded-xl p-6

inputs.default: bg-[#0f0f11] border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 text-white placeholder-[#64748b] focus:border-[#ec4899] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#ec4899] transition-all outline-none w-full

tables.header: text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-[#64748b] border-b border-white/5 pb-3

badges.active: bg-green-500/10 text-green-400 border border-green-500/20 px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs
badges.inactive: bg-red-500/10 text-red-400 border border-red-500/20 px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs
badges.pending: bg-yellow-500/10 text-yellow-400 border border-yellow-500/20 px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST have a visible hover state, primarily lightening the background or changing border color to the accent pink/purple.
motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Subtle fade in and slide up (y: 10 to 0) using Framer Motion.
motion_and_interaction.list_stagger: Table rows and metric cards should stagger their entrance animation.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure pure white text is used over the primary gradient to maintain > 4.5:1 ratio.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: CRITICAL: All interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, table actions) MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

login_background.description: Abstract purple glowing neon lines on a dark background, ideal for the split-screen login page.

user_avatar.description: Professional avatar image for the dashboard header/profile section.

logo_placeholder.description: Abstract neon sign to use as an inspirational logo backdrop or placeholder icon until SVG logo is rendered.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme #0f0f11 and #1a1a2e backgrounds.
Use the gradient from-[#7c3aed] to-[#ec4899] for primary CTA buttons and active navigation highlights.
Implement a Sidebar layout for navigation on the left, with the main content taking up the rest of the space.
Use Phosphor icons (duotone weight) for all dashboard metrics and sidebar links.
Add 'data-testid' to EVERY form input, button, and actionable item for testing.
